tomato_late_blight.description: A devastating fungal disease caused by Phytophthora infestans that can destroy entire crops within days
symptoms: White fuzzy mold growth on undersides of leaves
Brown spots on stems and fruit
Rapid spread in cool, humid conditions

tomato_early_blight.description: Common fungal disease caused by Alternaria solani, characterized by target-like spots on leaves
symptoms: Brown spots with concentric rings (target pattern)
Spots may appear on stems and fruit

tomato_healthy.description: Plant shows no signs of disease and exhibits normal, vigorous growth

tomato_bacterial_spot.description: Bacterial disease causing small dark spots on leaves and fruit
symptoms: Small dark spots with yellow halos
causes: Water splash from rain or irrigation

tomato_leaf_mold.description: Fungal disease most common in greenhouse tomatoes
symptoms: Yellow spots on upper leaf surface
Olive-green to gray-brown mold on undersides

potato_late_blight.description: Same pathogen as tomato late blight, devastating to potato crops
symptoms: Dark lesions on leaves and stems

potato_early_blight.description: Fungal disease affecting potato foliage and tubers

corn_common_rust.description: Fungal disease causing rust-colored pustules on corn leaves

apple_scab.description: Most serious disease of apple trees
symptoms: Olive-green to brown lesions on leaves
